detailParagraphs: The ACC – Awareness on Computer Concepts credential preparation Training Course is a foundational digital literacy program designed by NIELIT (National Institute of Electronics & Information Technology). It aims to equip learners and professionals with essential computer and internet knowledge to function confidently in the digital world.

Through hands-on and easy-to-understand lessons, you will develop core skills in operating systems, MS Office, web applications, and online transactions. detailParagraphs: The CPTE – Certified Penetration Testing Expert Course is an advanced cybersecurity credential preparation designed for professionals who want to master penetration testing and ethical hacking at an expert level. It focuses on identifying, exploiting, and reporting vulnerabilities in systems, networks, and web applications, providing you with the high-level technical expertise needed to excel in your career as a cybersecurity specialist.

Through hands-on labs, learners perform real-time attack simulations, exploit development, and post-exploitation activities to understand how hackers operate. detailParagraphs: The Diploma in Web Technology program is designed for learners and professionals who want to gain complete knowledge of website development — from designing user interfaces to building functional web applications. It covers both front-end (HTML, CSS, JS) and back-end (PHP, MySQL) development with real-world examples, providing you with the specialized technical expertise needed to advance your career.

Learners will work on live projects to build fully functional websites and interactive web applications. By completing this diploma course, you'll earn your Web Technology credential preparation, preparing for roles such as Web Developer, Front-End Designer, or Full Stack Developer in top tech companies or as a freelancer.
keyPoints: Course Duration:6–12 Months (Fast-track and weekend options available).
Eligibility: learners Beginners Aspiring Web Designers Developers.
Aspiring Web Designers.
Learn HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and responsive web design.
Master front-end and back-end web development concepts.
Work with databases using PHP and MySQL.
Understand domain hosting, FTP, and live deployment.
Create dynamic websites and web applications using real projects.
Earn your Diploma in Web Technology credential preparation and start a full-stack web career.
Understand the structure of the web, domains, hosting, and how websites function. Learn to differentiate between static and dynamic websites and explore career paths in web technology.
Learn design basics including color concepts, typography, layout principles, image formats, and how to use design tools to create user-friendly, visually appealing websites.
Master HTML for structuring web content and CSS for styling. Build static web pages and explore responsive design techniques for different devices and screen sizes.

title: Django Certification Training Course
description: Elevate your expertise with our Django training course. Master secure MTV architecture, REST APIs, and scalable backends through high-impact 2026 projects.
detailParagraphs: The Django credential preparation Training Course is designed for Python developers who want to build robust and scalable web applications. This course takes you from the fundamentals of Django to advanced web development practices, including APIs and deployment, providing you with the specialized technical expertise needed to advance your career.

Through hands-on projects, you'll create functional applications like blogs, e-commerce sites, and dashboards. By the end of this program, you'll be ready to earn your Django Developer credential preparation and start a professional career as a back-end or full-stack web developer.

title: DOAP – Diploma in Office Automation & Publishing

detailParagraphs: The Diploma in Office Automation & Publishing (DOAP) is designed for learners and professionals who want to master both administrative efficiency and creative design. This comprehensive curriculum blends office management and digital documentation with hands-on desktop publishing (DTP) training, giving you the versatile skill set needed to advance your career in any modern workplace.

Through hands-on, hands-on sessions, learners will become proficient in MS Office, Photoshop, and CorelDRAW, gaining the ability to manage office tasks, design layouts, and prepare documents for digital and print publishing. By the end of the program, you'll earn your DOAP credential preparation, qualifying for jobs in administration, publishing, and design sectors.

title: DOEACC NIELIT 'O' Level Course (Foundation Course in Computer Application)
description: The DOEACC NIELIT O' Level a Diploma in Computer. It is highly valued for both private-sector and government career eligibility.
detailParagraphs: The DOEACC NIELIT 'O' Level Course (Foundation Course in Computer Application) is a Government of India recognized qualification program designed by NIELIT (National Institute of Electronics & Information Technology). It serves as the entry-level credential preparation in computer education, equivalent to a foundation diploma in IT.

Through hands-on and theoretical learning, learners will master essential computer concepts, programming, and web technologies. Upon completion and successful examination, learners receive the NIELIT 'O' Level Certificate, which is valid for both government and private sector jobs, and also serves as a stepping stone to the 'A' Level (Advanced Diploma) Course.
keyPoints: Course Duration:1 Year (2 Semesters of 6 Months each).
Eligibility: 10+2 passed ITI Certificate passed (One year after Class 10).
ITI Certificate passed (One year after Class 10).
Learn computer fundamentals, data representation, and operating systems.
Understand office automation tools for documentation and business tasks.
Gain knowledge of programming languages (Python or C) for software development.
Learn web designing concepts using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript.
Explore database management and file handling techniques.
Prepare for the NIELIT 'O' Level Government credential preparation assessment recognized across India.
Information Technology Tools and Network Basics.
Web Designing & Publishing.
Programming and Problem Solving through Python.

title: EC-Council Associate Cybersecurity Certifications Training
description: Get your EC-Council credential preparation to master cybersecurity. Gain expert skills in ethical hacking, network defense, and incident response with our global training.
detailParagraphs: The EC-Council Associate Cybersecurity Certifications Training provides the foundational knowledge required to begin a career in ethical hacking and information security. This globally recognized program covers core topics like network defense, ethical hacking, digital forensics, and cyber awareness, providing you with the specialized technical expertise needed to advance your career.

Through hands-on labs and simulation environments, learners gain real-world exposure to threat detection, vulnerability testing, and incident response. Upon completion, learners can earn EC-Council's Associate Certifications and advance toward professional-level certifications like CEH (Certified Ethical Hacker) or CND (Certified Network Defender).

title: WordPress CMS Training Course
description: Master WordPress CMS to build professional websites. Learn Custom Theme Development, E-commerce Store Management, and SEO.
detailParagraphs: The WordPress CMS professional learning track is designed for learners, freelancers, and entrepreneurs who want to create professional, responsive websites without learning complex programming languages. This course focuses on hands-on learning through live website projects, providing you with the specialized technical expertise needed to advance your career.

Learners will gain hands-on experience in theme customization, plugin management, SEO optimization, and eCommerce integration using WooCommerce. By completing this course, you'll earn your WordPress CMS credential preparation, qualifying for roles such as Web Designer, WordPress Developer, or Digital Entrepreneur.
keyPoints: Next Batch:New batches start every month. Limited seats available – enroll early!
Course Duration:2 Months (including lab sessions).
Eligibility: Beginners Business Owners Bloggers Aspiring Web Developers.
Aspiring Web Developers.
Learn WordPress installation, dashboard management, and configuration.
Create and customize pages, posts, menus, and widgets.
Use themes, plugins, and builders to design professional websites.
Optimize websites using SEO, speed, and security tools.
Manage eCommerce stores using WooCommerce integration.
Earn your WordPress CMS credential preparation and start your career as a web developer or designer.
Understanding domain names and hosting options.
Installing WordPress on servers.

title: ZBrush Certification Course Training
description: Learn ZBrush to use Dynamesh, ZRemesher, and SubTools to create incredibly detailed models for movies, games, and 3D printing in 2026.
detailParagraphs: Learn ZBrush to use Dynamesh, ZRemesher, and SubTools to create incredibly detailed models for movies, games, and 3D printing in 2026.
By the end of ZBrush Certification Course Training, learners should be able to apply the covered tools and techniques in guided academic or professional scenarios.
keyPoints: Course Duration:12 Months including Lab.
Modes of Training: Online/Offline.
